The '''Vidicx Campaign''' was the collective name for a series of related battles fought in the [[Vidicx system/Legends|Vidicx system]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and an unknown enemy that may have been related to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The [[Scandium Team]] was an important participant on this campaign.<ref name="AJ10" />
